description_long: This object is a portable traffic barricade commonly used in urban environments to block or redirect pedestrian and vehicular traffic. It features a sturdy A-frame structure made of metal or heavy-duty plastic, with two horizontal panels displaying alternating orange and white diagonal reflective stripes for high visibility. At the top, there is a circular amber warning light mounted on a rectangular base, designed to alert drivers and pedestrians, especially at night or in low-visibility conditions. The legs are angled outward for stability, and the overall construction appears lightweight enough for manual repositioning. The surfaces are mostly matte with some slight gloss on the reflective stripes and light housing. The barricade is functional, durable, and designed to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A portable A-frame traffic barricade with orange and white diagonal reflective stripes and a mounted amber warning light on top. It is designed for high visibility and stability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both horizontal striped panels and the circular amber warning light centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure, the thickness of the panels, and the profile of the warning light.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped panels and the back of the warning light.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the A-frame profile and the side of the warning light.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Diagonal orange and white stripes, alternating, medium width, repeated across both horizontal panels.
